# Ratchet Rebaseline Approval 2026-05-18

Approved-by: Repository owner via chat request
Reason: Authorize the same-change protected-path updates that remove stale structural or coverage debt entries from `artifacts/analysis/file_debt_ratchet.json` after same-change proof brings the affected files to or below the structural target or up to full-file coverage, and retire same-change strict-clean typing debt entries from `pyproject.toml` after focused `pyright` proof shows the promoted files already pass. This approval covers only retiring obsolete sparse-ledger or typing-debt inventory entries and does not waive monotonic structural, typing, or coverage ratchet rules. This change applies that approval to promote `src/sattlint/contracts/findings.py`, `src/sattlint/devtools/finding_exports.py`, `src/sattlint/analyzers/alarm_integrity.py`, `src/sattlint/analyzers/loop_output_refactor.py`, `src/sattlint/analyzers/naming.py`, `src/sattlint/analyzers/rule_profiles.py`, `src/sattlint/cli/entry.py`, `src/sattlint/devtools/corpus.py`, `src/sattlint/engine.py`, `src/sattlint/resolution/context_builder.py`, `src/sattlint/docgenerator/classification.py`, and `src/sattlint/docgenerator/docgen.py` into `tool.pyright.strict` and retire their stale typing debt allowlist entries. The same approval also covers adding `src/sattlint/core/_semantic_helpers.py`, `src/sattlint/core/_semantic_index.py`, `src/sattlint/core/_semantic_index_reference_support.py`, `src/sattlint/core/_semantic_snapshot.py`, `src/sattlint/core/workspace_discovery.py`, `src/sattlint/reporting/_variables_report_rendering.py`, `src/sattlint/resolution/_alias_utils.py`, `src/sattlint/simulation/__init__.py`, `src/sattlint/simulation/_runtime_models.py`, and `src/sattlint/simulation/runtime.py` to `tool.pyright.strict` after focused proof confirms the support slice is already strict-clean. The same approval also covers adding `src/sattlint_lsp/_server_navigation.py`, `src/sattlint_lsp/_server_rename_completion.py`, `src/sattlint_lsp/_server_scan_helpers.py`, `src/sattlint_lsp/_server_symbol_helpers.py`, and `src/sattlint_lsp/_server_workspace.py` to `tool.pyright.strict` after focused LSP pytest and narrow strict `pyright` proof confirm the LSP helper slice is already strict-clean. The same approval also covers adding `src/sattline_parser/transformer/_module_assembly_mixin.py`, `src/sattline_parser/transformer/_module_header_mixin.py`, `src/sattline_parser/transformer/_module_layout_mixin.py`, and `src/sattline_parser/transformer/_module_shared.py` to `tool.pyright.strict` after focused parser proof and narrow strict `pyright` confirmation show the parser helper slice is already strict-clean. The same approval also covers adding `src/sattlint/_app_analysis_loading.py`, `src/sattlint/_app_analysis_menus.py`, `src/sattlint/_app_graphics_menus.py`, `src/sattlint/_app_graphics_reports.py`, `src/sattlint/_app_startup.py`, `src/sattlint/_app_startup_docs_graphics.py`, `src/sattlint/_app_startup_from_app.py`, `src/sattlint/_config_self_check.py`, `src/sattlint/config_io.py`, `src/sattlint/config_validation.py`, and `src/sattlint/types.py` to `tool.pyright.strict` after focused app/config pytest and narrow strict `pyright` proof confirm the app/config slice is already strict-clean.
